prompt: Create a realistic 3:4 vertical Korean fresh indoor lifestyle portrait with a soft healing atmosphere and premium lifestyle magazine cover quality. The scene is a minimalist cream-toned interior with warm natural light, beige walls, pale stone tile floor, and shallow depth of field. Show exactly one adult East Asian woman, visually 20 to 24 years old, positioned slightly left of center in a full-body composition, photographed at eye level from a subtly low angle. She has long natural black hair, loose and softly parted, fair luminous skin, delicate makeup, small earrings, and a gentle smiling expression while looking at the camera. She wears a short white sleeveless chiffon dress with shoulder bow straps and a softly gathered waist, white ankle socks, and glossy black Mary Jane shoes. Pose her kneeling elegantly beside a gray marble counter: one knee on the floor, the other leg raised forward, left hand relaxed near the floor/counter edge, right arm extended toward the camera making a V peace sign, creating a friendly candid snapshot feeling. Include exactly five main background props: one open silver laptop on the marble counter at far left, one glass of iced coffee beside it, one warm table lamp glowing in the back left, one round wooden table at right, and one clear glass vase on the table holding a delicate bouquet of pink roses, cream roses, and tiny white filler flowers. Add one rounded cream boucle lounge chair behind the table. Use soft creamy whites, beige, warm wood, gray marble, realistic skin texture, natural fabric folds, glossy shoe reflections, subtle bokeh, no text, no watermark, no extra people, no camera distortion, and maintain photorealistic GPT Image 2 quality.
